Name: Jack Ruby
Connection: JFK assassination - shot Lee Harvey Oswald on live TV before he could stand trial
Circumstances: Shot Oswald two days after JFK's assassination preventing any trial or testimony; claimed he would tell everything if moved to Washington DC; died from rapidly progressing lung cancer before his appeals concluded
Investigation: Closed - died in custody; stated he wanted to tell more

Name: Karyn Kupcinet
Connection: JFK assassination - her father reportedly received a forewarning call about the Kennedy assassination
Circumstances: Found strangled in her apartment; multiple reports suggest she tried to warn someone about the assassination the day before it happened; case was never solved
Investigation: Unsolved murder

Name: Grant Stockdale
Connection: JFK assassination - was a close personal friend of President Kennedy; told friends he knew things about the killing
Circumstances: Fell from the 13th floor of the Dupont Building in Miami; had been telling friends he had information about the Kennedy assassination; left no suicide note
Investigation: Ruled suicide - no suicide note; disputed

Name: Bill Hunter
Connection: JFK assassination - had entered Jack Ruby's home after the assassination and interviewed his associates
Circumstances: Shot dead in Long Beach police station pressroom; Officer Creighton Wiggins first claimed accidental discharge but was convicted of manslaughter; Hunter had been actively investigating Ruby's network
Investigation: Closed - officer convicted

Name: Gary Underhill
Connection: JFK assassination - told friends he knew who killed Kennedy and that 'they' knew he knew
Circumstances: Found shot in the head; had told friends he knew who was responsible for Kennedy's assassination and feared for his own life
Investigation: Ruled suicide - disputed by those who knew him

Name: Jim Koethe
Connection: JFK assassination - was investigating Jack Ruby and had access to Ruby's home days after assassination
Circumstances: Found dead in his Dallas apartment killed by a single karate chop to the throat; had been actively investigating Ruby's associates and network
Investigation: Unsolved murder

Name: Dorothy Kilgallen
Occupation: Celebrity journalist and What's My Line panelist
Connection: JFK assassination - obtained the only private interview with Jack Ruby; told friends she had info to break the case wide open
Circumstances: Found dead after securing a private interview with Ruby; told multiple friends she had obtained information that would expose the conspiracy; her notes and files disappeared after her death; her close friend Margaret Smith died two days later
Investigation: Ruled accidental - notes vanished; close friend died two days later

Name: David Ferrie
Connection: JFK assassination - key target of Jim Garrison's investigation in New Orleans; was linked to Oswald
Circumstances: Died the night before he was scheduled to testify in Garrison's investigation; two typewritten notes found in his apartment; Garrison publicly stated he believed Ferrie was murdered
Investigation: Ruled natural - Garrison disputed ruling

Name: Eladio del Valle
Connection: JFK assassination - was being actively sought by Jim Garrison's investigators on the same day Ferrie died
Circumstances: Found shot through the heart and struck with an axe on the exact same day David Ferrie died; both men were being simultaneously sought by Garrison's investigation
Investigation: Unsolved murder

Name: Sam Giancana
Connection: JFK assassination - arranged CIA-mob cooperation; knew about CIA-mob plots against Castro and Kennedy
Circumstances: Shot in the back of the head in his own basement kitchen in Chicago; had been scheduled to testify before the Senate Intelligence Committee the following day about CIA-mob assassination plots
Investigation: Confirmed murder - unsolved; killed the day before Senate testimony

Name: Johnny Roselli
Connection: JFK assassination - had testified about CIA-mob plots against Castro; was subpoenaed to testify again
Circumstances: Found dismembered in an oil drum in Miami Bay; had recently testified before the Senate Intelligence Committee about CIA-mob plots against Castro and was subpoenaed to appear again
Investigation: Confirmed murder - unsolved; killed before further testimony

Name: George de Mohrenschildt
Connection: JFK assassination - was Lee Harvey Oswald's closest personal friend and confidant in Dallas
Circumstances: Found dead from a shotgun wound to the head on the same day a House Select Committee on Assassinations investigator finally made contact with him; had reportedly told the researcher he feared for his life
Investigation: Ruled suicide - found same day HSCA investigator contacted him

Name: Charlie Nicoletti
Connection: JFK assassination - connected to organized crime's role in the Kennedy killing; was scheduled to testify
Circumstances: Shot three times in the back of the head while sitting in his car in a Chicago parking lot; was scheduled to testify before the House Select Committee on Assassinations
Investigation: Confirmed murder - unsolved; killed before HSCA testimony

Name: John Paisley
Occupation: CIA Deputy Director of Strategic Research
Connection: JFK assassination - reportedly possessed knowledge about Kennedy-era CIA operations and the assassination itself
Circumstances: Found floating in Maryland's Patuxent River with diving weights strapped to his body and a gunshot wound to the head; police initially described the death as 'execution-style' before officially ruling it suicide
Investigation: Ruled suicide - police initially described as execution-style

Name: William Sullivan
Connection: JFK assassination - was the senior FBI official involved in the Executive Action assassination project; scheduled to testify before HSCA
Circumstances: Shot near his New Hampshire home during hunting season; had been scheduled to testify before the House Select Committee on Assassinations; one of six senior FBI officials to die in a six-month period in 1977
Investigation: Ruled accidental - one of six senior FBI officials to die in six months in 1977

Name: Marilyn Monroe
Connection: Kennedy family connections - had affairs with President Kennedy and Robert Kennedy; was reportedly upset at being dropped by both
Circumstances: Found dead from overdose of chloral hydrate and Nembutal; had been in contact with the Kennedys in her final days; her phone records before death and the movements of RFK associates that night remain subjects of dispute; her original police notes went missing
Investigation: Ruled probable suicide - circumstances disputed for decades

Name: John F. Kennedy
Connection: Political assassination - sitting President of the United States
Circumstances: Assassinated in Dallas Texas; Warren Commission ruled lone gunman Lee Harvey Oswald acting alone; House Select Committee on Assassinations in 1979 found a probable conspiracy; multiple witnesses subsequently died under unusual circumstances over the following years
Investigation: Warren Commission: lone gunman; HSCA 1979: probable conspiracy

Name: Malcolm X
Occupation: Black nationalist leader and civil rights activist
Connection: FBI COINTELPRO - was under extensive FBI and NYPD surveillance and infiltration; his security had been compromised by informants
Circumstances: Shot dead at the Audubon Ballroom in Manhattan; three Nation of Islam members convicted; NYPD had an undercover officer present during the shooting; FBI informant witnessed the assassination without intervening; COINTELPRO documents confirm FBI worked to destroy his organization
Investigation: Three convicted - government foreknowledge now documented by released records

Name: Martin Luther King Jr.
Occupation: Civil rights leader and Nobel Peace Prize winner
Connection: FBI COINTELPRO - FBI sent King an anonymous letter urging him to commit suicide; sought to destroy his reputation
Circumstances: Shot at the Lorraine Motel in Memphis Tennessee; James Earl Ray convicted and imprisoned; King family won a 1999 civil lawsuit finding that a Memphis police officer was part of a broader conspiracy that was known to the government; FBI COINTELPRO program against King is documented fact
Investigation: Ray convicted; King family 1999 civil suit found broader conspiracy

Name: Robert F. Kennedy
Occupation: US Senator and Democratic Presidential frontrunner
Connection: Political assassination - was the frontrunner for the Democratic nomination and the expected future president
Circumstances: Shot at the Ambassador Hotel Los Angeles after winning the California primary; Sirhan Sirhan convicted and imprisoned; forensic evidence shows more shots were fired than Sirhan's gun could hold; RFK's fatal wounds entered from behind while Sirhan fired from in front; multiple witnesses described a second gunman
Investigation: Sirhan convicted; physical evidence of second gunman disputed in court appeals

Name: Mary Jo Kopechne
Occupation: Robert Kennedy campaign worker and secretary
Connection: Kennedy family - was a passenger in Senator Ted Kennedy's car at Chappaquiddick Island; Kennedy fled the scene for 9 hours
Circumstances: Died when Senator Ted Kennedy drove his car off the Dike Bridge; Kennedy did not report the accident for approximately 9 hours; she may have survived in an air pocket for some time after the car sank; Kennedy pleaded guilty to leaving the scene of an accident and received a suspended sentence
Investigation: Kennedy pleaded guilty to leaving accident scene; broader circumstances disputed

Name: Olof Palme
Connection: International peace advocacy and anti-apartheid activism
Circumstances: Swedish PM shot dead on a Stockholm street after leaving a cinema with his wife; perpetrator was never definitively identified despite a 38-year investigation that cost over $80 million; case formally closed in 2020 with chief suspect already dead
Investigation: Confirmed murder - perpetrator never identified; case closed 2020

Name: Yitzhak Rabin
Connection: Israel-Palestine peace process - had signed the Oslo Accords; was pursuing a negotiated settlement against strong domestic opposition
Circumstances: Shot twice in the back at a peace rally in Tel Aviv by Jewish extremist Yigal Amir who opposed the Oslo peace process; Amir was convicted and remains imprisoned; some Israeli researchers have raised questions about aspects of the forensic evidence
Investigation: Confirmed murder - Amir convicted

Name: Princess Diana
Connection: British Royal Family - was reportedly engaged to Dodi Fayed; was outspoken about landmines and other politically sensitive causes
Official_Cause: Car crash in Paris tunnel (UK inquest: unlawful killing by pursuing vehicles)
Circumstances: Died in crash in Paris Pont de l'Alma tunnel; French investigation ruled accident; British inquest jury in 2008 returned an unlawful killing verdict attributing death to the grossly negligent driving of pursuing vehicles while the car's driver was impaired
Investigation: UK inquest jury 2008: unlawful killing by pursuing vehicles

Name: Mel Carnahan
Occupation: Missouri Governor and Democratic Senate candidate
Connection: Political - was challenging John Ashcroft for a Senate seat in one of the most contested races in the country
Circumstances: Governor died when the small plane piloted by his son crashed in fog and instrument failure 18 days before the election; he posthumously won the Senate election
Investigation: Ruled accidental - instrument failure and weather conditions

Name: John F. Kennedy Jr.
Occupation: Magazine publisher and son of President Kennedy
Connection: Kennedy family - son of the assassinated president; was reportedly planning a Senate run
Official_Cause: Plane crash (ruled pilot error - spatial disorientation)
Circumstances: Son of President Kennedy died when his small plane went into a graveyard spiral off Martha's Vineyard; wife and sister-in-law also died; NTSB ruled the cause was pilot spatial disorientation due to flying at night without an instrument rating
Investigation: Ruled accidental - NTSB: pilot spatial disorientation

Name: Benazir Bhutto
Occupation: Pakistani opposition leader and former Prime Minister
Connection: Pakistan - was returning from exile to contest elections; had survived a mass-casualty bombing six weeks earlier
Circumstances: Former Pakistani PM was killed at a political rally in Rawalpindi; was shot and then a suicide bomb exploded; her party and international observers accused elements of Pakistan's security services of complicity in the attack
Investigation: Confirmed assassination - security service complicity alleged by family

Name: Paul Wellstone
Connection: Political opposition - the only senator to vote against both the Iraq War authorization and the Patriot Act
Circumstances: Liberal senator who opposed the Iraq War died in a plane crash 11 days before his re-election vote; FBI investigated possible foul play based on documented death threats he had received before concluding the crash was accidental
Investigation: Ruled accidental by NTSB - FBI had investigated possible foul play

Name: Karen Silkwood
Occupation: Nuclear plant worker and union activist
Connection: Nuclear industry - was collecting evidence of safety violations at the Kerr-McGee plutonium plant to hand to a journalist
Circumstances: Was driving to meet a New York Times reporter with documented evidence of safety violations when her car went off the road; the documents she was carrying were never found in the wreckage; a later civil lawsuit found Kerr-McGee liable for her plutonium contamination; inspired the 1983 film Silkwood
Investigation: Ruled accidental - documents disappeared from crash site

Name: Pope John Paul I
Connection: Vatican - died after only 33 days as pope; had reportedly been reviewing Vatican Bank irregularities and considering personnel changes
Circumstances: New pope was found dead in bed 33 days after his election; no autopsy was conducted; body was embalmed within hours; the official story of who found the body changed multiple times; had reportedly been reviewing Vatican Bank operations before his death; multiple books have argued for murder
Investigation: No autopsy conducted - officially cardiac arrest; widely disputed

Name: Roberto Calvi
Occupation: Italian banker - Chairman of Banco Ambrosiano
Connection: BCCI/Vatican Bank - bank was connected to the Vatican Bank BCCI and the P2 Masonic lodge; involved in laundering money for the Mafia
Official_Cause: Hanging under Blackfriars Bridge (initial suicide ruling overturned to unlawful killing)
Circumstances: Found hanging under Blackfriars Bridge in London with bricks in his pockets and $15000 in cash; initial suicide verdict was overturned at a 2002 inquest which found unlawful killing; Banco Ambrosiano had just collapsed with massive debts to the Vatican Bank
Investigation: Suicide overturned to unlawful killing at 2002 inquest

Name: Barry Seal
Connection: CIA drug trafficking and Mena Arkansas - simultaneously ran cocaine for the Medellin cartel while being a DEA informant; reportedly connected to CIA Contra funding
Circumstances: Shot by Medellin cartel hitmen in Baton Rouge Louisiana; had been providing DEA with information on the Medellin cartel while allegedly running drug operations connected to CIA Contra funding through Mena Arkansas; Oliver North's address book contained his address
Investigation: Confirmed murder - cartel hitmen convicted

Name: William Casey
Connection: Iran-Contra - knew the full extent of the weapons sales and funds diversion to the Nicaraguan Contras
Circumstances: CIA Director died one day after Congress began Iran-Contra public hearings; had suffered a sudden severe seizure the day before he was to be questioned by the Senate Intelligence Committee; underwent brain tumor surgery and never recovered sufficiently to testify

Name: John Tower
Occupation: Former US Senator and Tower Commission chair
Connection: Iran-Contra - chaired the Tower Commission investigation into Iran-Contra; had extensive knowledge of covert programs
Circumstances: Former chairman of the Senate Armed Services Committee and head of the Tower Commission died when his commuter plane crashed near Brunswick Georgia; NTSB found a propeller malfunction; occurred the day after Senator John Heinz died in a separate unrelated plane crash
Investigation: Ruled accidental - NTSB propeller malfunction

Name: Danny Casolaro
Connection: Iran-Contra/BCCI/Inslaw - was investigating a vast linked conspiracy he called the Octopus
Circumstances: Found with wrists slashed 12 times in a Martinsburg West Virginia hotel bathtub; had told his brother 'if anything happens to me don't believe it was an accident'; body was illegally embalmed before family was notified; hotel room was immediately cleaned; FBI task force members later questioned the suicide conclusion
Investigation: Ruled suicide - FBI task force questioned the conclusion

Name: William Colby
Connection: CIA - cooperated with Church Committee investigations revealing many sensitive programs; made enemies within the intelligence community
Circumstances: Former CIA director went canoeing from his Maryland cabin and disappeared; body found nine days later floating near shore; had become unpopular within intelligence circles by cooperating with congressional oversight and revealing CIA programs

Name: Ron Brown
Connection: Clinton administration - Cabinet member who was under independent counsel investigation and had allegedly indicated willingness to cooperate with prosecutors
Circumstances: Died when Air Force CT-43 crashed into a Croatian mountainside; Air Force attributed crash to pilot error; an Armed Forces Institute of Pathology physician initially noted a circular wound in Brown's skull resembling a gunshot entry wound; subsequent X-rays concluded blunt force trauma
Investigation: Ruled accidental - head wound not fully resolved to satisfaction of all

Name: Vince Foster
Connection: Clinton administration - was Deputy White House Counsel and former law partner of Hillary Clinton at Rose Law Firm
Circumstances: Found dead in Fort Marcy Park Virginia with a gunshot wound to the mouth; five separate investigations including by Independent Counsel Kenneth Starr all ruled suicide; family has always accepted the suicide verdict; the single most scrutinized Clinton-era death
Investigation: Ruled suicide - five separate investigations confirmed

Name: Barry Jennings
Connection: 9/11 - was trapped inside WTC7 on September 11; publicly testified to hearing and feeling explosions inside the building before either tower fell
Official_Cause: Sudden death - cause never publicly disclosed
Circumstances: Key eyewitness to events inside WTC7 on 9/11 died suddenly two days before NIST released its final report on WTC7's collapse; a filmmaker hired a private investigator who confirmed the death but could not obtain details about the cause

Name: Mike Connell
Occupation: Republican IT consultant and Karl Rove operative
Connection: US elections 2004/2008 - managed email servers for Bush White House and RNC; was subpoenaed about alleged 2004 Ohio election fraud
Official_Cause: Small plane crash near his Ohio home
Circumstances: Chief IT consultant for Karl Rove died when his Piper Saratoga crashed near his Akron Ohio home; had been subpoenaed to testify about alleged manipulation of 2004 Ohio election results; had reportedly told investigators he feared Karl Rove wanted him dead
Investigation: Ruled accidental - subpoena and reported death threats are documented

Name: Gareth Williams
Connection: British intelligence - was working on joint signals intelligence operations with the NSA; had downloaded classified files
Official_Cause: Found padlocked inside a holdall bag in his own flat
Circumstances: British intelligence officer was found padlocked inside a red North Face holdall bag in the bath of his locked London flat; a pathologist testified that it was virtually impossible to do this to oneself; a coroner's inquest concluded he had locked himself in while alone

Name: John O'Neill
Connection: 9/11 and Al-Qaeda - had aggressively pursued Al-Qaeda leads but was repeatedly blocked from investigating; had publicly warned about an imminent major attack
Official_Cause: Killed in 9/11 attacks on his first week at new job at WTC
Circumstances: FBI's top Al-Qaeda expert who had repeatedly warned of an imminent major attack died on his first week as head of security at the World Trade Center; had resigned from the FBI in frustration months before the attacks

Name: David Kelly
Occupation: UK Government weapons inspector and biological warfare expert
Connection: Iraq War intelligence - was the source for a BBC report that the Blair government had falsely sexed up the Iraq WMD dossier
Circumstances: Found dead near his home; had told a British diplomat months earlier he would probably be found dead in the woods if Iraq was invaded; no fingerprints found on knife or pill packets; six doctors formally contested the suicide ruling at the High Court; files initially ordered sealed for 70 years

Name: Lech Kaczynski
Connection: Poland/Russia - was attending a ceremony commemorating the Soviet Katyn massacre of Polish officers when his plane crashed at Smolensk Russia
Circumstances: Polish president and 95 other senior Polish officials and military chiefs died when their plane crashed at Smolensk; Russia attributed it to pilot error; Poland's subsequent reinvestigation found evidence consistent with an explosion on board; the crash killed a significant fraction of Poland's senior leadership

Name: Extortion 17 - 38 killed

Connection: Bin Laden raid - helicopter carried multiple SEAL Team 6 members who had killed Bin Laden three months earlier in Operation Neptune Spear
Official_Cause: Shot down by Taliban RPG - all 38 killed

Name: J. Clifford Baxter
Connection: Enron scandal - had objected to Enron's fraudulent practices and had just agreed to testify before Congress against others
Circumstances: Found shot in his Mercedes near his Houston home; had just agreed to testify as a witness against others in the Enron case; local police were criticized for declaring suicide before completing the investigation; two independent forensic experts said murder could not be ruled out
Investigation: Ruled suicide - two independent experts said murder could not be ruled out

Name: Kenneth Lay
Connection: Enron scandal - convicted on 10 counts of fraud and conspiracy in what was then the largest corporate fraud case in US history
Official_Cause: Heart attack three months before sentencing
Circumstances: Enron's founder died of a massive coronary at his Aspen Colorado vacation home three months before sentencing; under US law his conviction was legally vacated because he died before exhausting his appeals meaning his estate was not required to pay any restitution

Name: David Kellermann
Connection: 2008 financial crisis - was acting CFO of Freddie Mac which had been seized by the US government during the crisis

Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: William Broeksmit
Connection: Banking fraud - Deutsche Bank was under Senate investigation for allegedly hiding $12 billion in losses during the financial crisis
Circumstances: Found hanged in his South Kensington London home; Deutsche Bank was under Senate Subcommittee investigation for hiding massive losses; his death occurred the day before a former Deutsche Bank colleague was to speak publicly about those hidden losses

Name: Gabriel Magee
Connection: Banking fraud - JPMorgan was under Senate investigation for the London Whale scandal involving over $6 billion in hidden losses
Circumstances: Fell from the roof of JPMorgan's 33-story European headquarters in Canary Wharf; was one of three banker deaths in a single week; JPMorgan was under investigation for hiding massive derivatives trading losses
Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: Mike Dueker
Connection: Banking - former Federal Reserve economist
Official_Cause: Fall from highway ramp embankment (ruled suicide)
Circumstances: Found dead after falling 50 feet down an embankment from a highway ramp near the Tacoma Narrows Bridge in Washington State; was a former Federal Reserve economist
Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: Kenneth Bellando
Connection: Banking fraud - his brother John Bellando was directly named in the Senate's London Whale investigation report
Circumstances: Former JPMorgan analyst found dead outside his 6-story Manhattan apartment building; his brother John Bellando was specifically named in the Senate's report about JPMorgan hiding over $6 billion in trading losses
Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: Thierry Leyne
Connection: Finance - had entered a business partnership with former IMF chief Dominique Strauss-Kahn after his sexual assault scandal
Circumstances: Banker who had entered business with Dominique Strauss-Kahn after the IMF chief's scandal jumped from the 23rd floor of a Tel Aviv apartment building
Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: Richard Talley
Connection: Finance - founder of American Title Services which was under active investigation by the Colorado Division of Insurance at the time of his death
Official_Cause: Multiple nail gun wounds to head and chest (ruled suicide)
Circumstances: Found dead at his Colorado home with multiple nail gun wounds to his head and chest; his company was under active investigation; the means of self-infliction was widely considered nearly impossible

Name: Calogero Gambino
Connection: Banking fraud - Deutsche Bank legal counsel during the period of LIBOR rate manipulation investigations
Circumstances: Senior Deutsche Bank legal counsel found hanged at his New Jersey home during the period of Deutsche Bank's fraud investigations
Investigation: Ruled suicide

Name: Benito Que
Occupation: Infectious disease specialist at Miami Medical School
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - part of 11 prominent microbiologists who died in a 5-month period after 9/11
Circumstances: Police initially suspected carjacking in the school parking lot but the body showed no signs of a beating; doctors concluded stroke or cardiac event; one of 11 prominent microbiologists who died within 5 months after 9/11
Investigation: Ruled natural - part of documented post-9/11 microbiologist cluster

Name: Don C. Wiley
Occupation: Harvard microbiologist - foremost expert on viral immune response to HIV ebola and influenza
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - expert on the exact pathogens most relevant to bioterrorism
Official_Cause: Presumed dizzy spell and fall from bridge into Mississippi River
Circumstances: Found missing when rental car was abandoned on a Memphis bridge; body recovered from the Mississippi River a month later; was one of the world's foremost experts on immune response to bioterrorism pathogens
Investigation: Ruled accidental - part of post-9/11 microbiologist cluster

Name: Vladimir Pasechnik
Occupation: Former Soviet biowarfare scientist and UK defector
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - high-level defector who revealed the full scope of the Soviet bioweapons program
Circumstances: Former Soviet biowarfare scientist who defected to the UK in 1989 and played a central role in revealing Soviet bioweapons secrets died of a stroke; the autopsy was performed by a pathologist associated with British intelligence

Name: Robert M. Schwartz
Occupation: DNA sequencing and pathogen expert at Center for Innovative Technology
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - expert in DNA sequencing and pathogenic micro-organisms
Circumstances: Stabbed and slashed with what police believed was a sword at his Virginia farmhouse; his daughter and fellow cult members were arrested and convicted of the murder

Name: Nguyen Van Set
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - worked at lab that had just discovered a virulent strain of mousepox that alarmed bioweapons experts
Circumstances: Entered an airlocked nitrogen-filled storage room at the Geelong CSIRO facility in Australia and died from nitrogen exposure; his laboratory had recently published alarming findings about mousepox genetic modification
Investigation: Ruled accidental - workplace accident

Name: Victor Korshunov
Occupation: Russian microbiologist - expert in intestinal bacteria
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - Russian expert in intestinal bacteria of children
Circumstances: Was beaten over the head near his Moscow home and killed; part of the documented post-9/11 international cluster of microbiologist deaths
Investigation: Unsolved murder

Name: Ian Langford
Occupation: British microbiologist - expert in environmental risks and disease
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - British expert in environmental risks and disease
Official_Cause: Found dead under suspicious circumstances at home
Circumstances: Found dead in his home near Norwich England partially naked and wedged under a chair; the circumstances of his death were never satisfactorily explained

Name: David Wynn-Williams
Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - studied microbes able to survive extreme conditions including outer space
Circumstances: Respected astrobiologist hit and killed by a car while jogging near his Cambridge home; occurred one day before the next death in the cluster

Name: Steven Mostow

Connection: Post-9/11 microbiologist cluster - noted expert in treating influenza and in bioterrorism preparedness
Circumstances: Known as Dr. Flu died when the small airplane he was piloting crashed near Denver; was the 11th microbiologist to die in the five-month post-9/11 cluster
Investigation: Ruled accidental - 11th death in post-9/11 microbiologist cluster

Name: Bruce Ivins
Connection: Anthrax attacks 2001 - FBI officially concluded he was the sole perpetrator of the anthrax letter attacks that killed five people and infected 17 others

Name: Anna Politkovskaya
Occupation: Russian investigative journalist for Novaya Gazeta

Occupation: Former Russian FSB officer and defector
Connection: Russian intelligence - had defected to UK; accused FSB of orchestrating Moscow apartment bombings that brought Putin to power; was investigating Russian organized crime

Name: Natalya Estemirova
Occupation: Russian human rights activist and Memorial researcher

Circumstances: Body found with bullet wounds to head and chest in Ingushetia hours after she was abducted from near her Grozny home; had investigated rights abuses attributed to Chechen security forces; Chechnya's Kadyrov had publicly condemned her work

Name: Sergei Magnitsky

Name: Alexander Perepilichny

Name: Nikolai Glushkov
Occupation: Russian exiled businessman and Kremlin critic
Connection: Russia - was a close associate of Boris Berezovsky who died the same month; both were prominent Kremlin critics in London

Circumstances: Found strangled in his London home shortly after his friend Boris Berezovsky died; had been a close associate and Kremlin critic; a UK inquest jury in April 2021 concluded he had been unlawfully killed; perpetrators were never identified

Name: Boris Berezovsky
Occupation: Russian oligarch and Putin critic in exile in London
Connection: Russia - was one of Russia's most powerful oligarchs before fleeing; became Putin's fiercest public critic; funded Russian opposition activities
Circumstances: Found hanging at his Ascot England home; had been one of Russia's most powerful oligarchs before exile; his family friends and several former intelligence officials disputed suicide; UK inquest jury returned an open verdict - could not conclude whether he killed himself

Name: Boris Nemtsov
Occupation: Russian opposition leader and former Deputy Prime Minister
Connection: Russia - Putin's most prominent domestic political opponent; was compiling a report on Russian military involvement in Ukraine

Circumstances: Shot dead four times in the back while walking on a bridge directly in front of the Kremlin; was in the process of compiling a detailed report on Russian military activity in eastern Ukraine; five Chechen men were convicted but the person who ordered the killing was never identified or charged

Name: Gary Webb
Occupation: Investigative journalist at San Jose Mercury News
Connection: CIA drug trafficking - broke the 1996 Dark Alliance series linking CIA Contra networks to the crack cocaine epidemic in US cities
Official_Cause: Two gunshot wounds to head (ruled suicide)
Circumstances: Found dead with two gunshot wounds to the head; Sacramento County coroner ruled suicide; acknowledged two shots to the head is unusual for suicide but said it has occurred; Webb had been blacklisted from major journalism since his 1996 story despite it being substantially vindicated by the CIA's own inspector general report
Investigation: Ruled suicide - two shots to head widely considered suspicious

Name: Robin Cook

Investigation: Officer charged then charges dropped - ongoing controversy

Name: Freddie Gray
Connection: Civil rights/police violence - suffered a severed spine in the back of a police van after his arrest
Official_Cause: Spinal cord injury sustained in police van
Circumstances: Black man died after suffering a severed spinal cord while in the back of a Baltimore police van; six officers were charged; all were acquitted or had charges dropped; his death and the subsequent riots became a major focal point of the Black Lives Matter movement
Investigation: All officers acquitted or charges dropped - major protests in Baltimore

Name: Eric Garner
Connection: Civil rights/police violence - was placed in a chokehold by police while being arrested for selling loose cigarettes
Circumstances: Black man died after NYPD officer Daniel Pantaleo placed him in a chokehold that medical examiners ruled a homicide; Garner said 'I can't breathe' eleven times; his last words became a rallying cry; the officer was not indicted by a grand jury and was not fired until 2019
Investigation: Medical examiner: homicide - grand jury did not indict; officer fired 2019

Name: Michael Brown
Connection: Civil rights/police violence - was shot by Officer Darren Wilson in Ferguson Missouri; his death sparked the Ferguson uprising
Circumstances: Black 18-year-old was shot and killed by Ferguson police officer Darren Wilson; the circumstances were disputed; a grand jury did not indict Wilson; a Department of Justice investigation cleared Wilson of civil rights charges but found systematic discrimination in the Ferguson Police Department
Investigation: Grand jury did not indict - DOJ found systematic discrimination in Ferguson PD

Name: Trayvon Martin
Connection: Civil rights - was shot by neighborhood watch volunteer George Zimmerman while walking home
Circumstances: 17-year-old Black teenager was shot and killed by George Zimmerman a neighborhood watch volunteer in Sanford Florida while walking home from a convenience store; Zimmerman was acquitted on grounds of self-defense; the acquittal helped spark the founding of the Black Lives Matter movement
Investigation: Zimmerman acquitted - Black Lives Matter movement began in response

Name: Aaron Bushnell
Connection: Gaza war - set himself on fire outside the Israeli Embassy in Washington DC to protest US support for the Gaza war
Official_Cause: Death by self-immolation as political protest
Circumstances: US Air Force serviceman set himself on fire outside the Israeli Embassy in Washington DC while shouting 'Free Palestine'; died from burns; left a statement describing the act as 'extreme action in the face of genocide'
Investigation: Death by self-immolation - political protest

Name: Sinead O'Connor
Connection: Media/religious abuse - had controversially torn up a photo of Pope John Paul II on SNL in 1992 to protest Catholic Church child abuse; her career was destroyed while she was ultimately vindicated
Circumstances: Irish singer who was widely condemned in 1992 for her protest against Catholic Church abuse but was later vindicated when the Church's child abuse scandal became fully known died in July 2023 of natural causes
Investigation: Ruled natural

Name: Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis
Connection: Iraq/Iran - was commander of Iraq's Popular Mobilization Forces and a key Iranian proxy in Iraq
Official_Cause: Killed in same US drone strike as Qasem Soleimani
Circumstances: Iraqi paramilitary commander was killed in the same US drone strike at Baghdad airport that killed Iranian General Soleimani; was commander of Iran-aligned Popular Mobilization Forces in Iraq; his killing was condemned by the Iraqi government

Name: Afghan drone strike victims
Connection: Afghanistan - US drone strike killed civilians including children in the final days of the US withdrawal
Circumstances: In the chaotic final days of the US withdrawal from Afghanistan a US drone strike targeted what was believed to be an ISIS-K suicide bomber but killed a humanitarian worker Zemari Ahmadi and nine members of his family including seven children; the US initially defended the strike then admitted it was a tragic mistake
Investigation: Confirmed wrongful killing - US admitted the strike killed civilians; no one charged

Name: Pat Tillman
Connection: Military coverup - was killed by friendly fire in Afghanistan but the military covered up the true cause of death
Official_Cause: Friendly fire from fellow soldiers (covered up as enemy action)
Circumstances: NFL star who gave up his career to join the Army Rangers after 9/11 was killed by friendly fire in Afghanistan; the US military initially told his family and the public he died heroically in an enemy ambush; the truth emerged later through an internal investigation; multiple officers were investigated but none prosecuted; his family accused the Army of a deliberate cover-up
Investigation: Covered up initially - multiple officers investigated but none prosecuted

Name: Qasem Soleimani
Connection: Iran/Iraq - was the most powerful military figure in Iran; the architect of Iran's regional proxy strategy
Official_Cause: Killed by US drone strike at Baghdad airport
Circumstances: Iranian general and commander of the IRGC Quds Force was killed by a US drone strike at Baghdad International Airport; President Trump authorized the strike; Iran retaliated with missile strikes on US bases in Iraq; the killing was condemned by many as a violation of international law
Investigation: Confirmed US military action - international legal controversy

Name: Journalists killed in Mexico 2017
Connection: Mexico drug war - Mexico is the most dangerous country for journalists in the world outside active war zones
Circumstances: Dozens of Mexican journalists are killed every year for reporting on drug cartels and government corruption; Mexico consistently ranks as one of the world's most dangerous countries for press freedom; between 2000 and 2023 over 150 journalists were killed in Mexico
Investigation: Ongoing - impunity rate over 90% in Mexico

Name: Juvénal Habyarimana
Connection: Rwanda genocide - his plane was shot down triggering the Rwandan genocide that killed 800000 people
Circumstances: President of Rwanda was killed when his plane was shot down by missiles as it approached Kigali airport; his death is considered the trigger for the Rwandan genocide; both Hutu extremists and the RPF were accused of the shooting; an international investigation decades later implicated RPF forces

Name: Bakhmut soldiers
Occupation: Ukrainian and Russian soldiers at Bakhmut
Connection: Ukraine war - the most lethal single battle of the Ukraine war involving Prigozhin's Wagner forces
Official_Cause: Killed in battle - Wagner's bloodiest campaign
Circumstances: The battle of Bakhmut from August 2022 to May 2023 resulted in enormous casualties on both sides; Wagner Group bore the heaviest burden; Prigozhin's outrage at Russian military commanders over the handling of Wagner casualties was a primary driver of his subsequent mutiny

Name: Patrice Lumumba
Occupation: First democratically elected Prime Minister of Congo
Connection: CIA/Belgium - his assassination was supported by the CIA and Belgian intelligence; he was killed months after Congolese independence
Circumstances: Congo's first democratically elected PM was arrested tortured and executed with CIA and Belgian intelligence involvement in 1961; his death was covered up for years; Belgium formally apologized in 2002; CIA cables from 1960 show US officials plotting his death
Investigation: Confirmed murder - CIA and Belgian intelligence involvement documented

Name: Shawn Lucas
Connection: DNC lawsuit - was the process server who served the DNC with a lawsuit alleging fraud against Bernie Sanders supporters
Official_Cause: Found dead on his bathroom floor of mixed drug intoxication
Circumstances: The Democratic process server who became famous for serving the DNC with the fraud lawsuit in a viral video was found dead on his bathroom floor by his girlfriend just weeks after the filing; medical examiner found a combination of drugs
Investigation: Ruled accidental drug intoxication

Name: Giulio Regeni
Connection: Egypt - was conducting research on independent trade unions in Egypt; was abducted tortured and killed by Egyptian security forces
Circumstances: Italian Cambridge University PhD student was abducted from the Cairo Metro on the anniversary of the Egyptian revolution; his body was found near Cairo showing signs of prolonged and brutal torture; Italian prosecutors charged five Egyptian security officials; Egypt denied any involvement for years before acknowledging its officials were connected
